title: KUMUKA KWEVAKAFA
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: KUMUKA KWEVAKAFA (Resurrection of the Dead)

verses.text: 23.KUMUKA KWEVAKAFA 15/01/26 hakuna RUFU,
chinonzi RUFU kukanganwa
chinonzi kumuka kwe vakafa KUYEUKA
Pakumuka kwe vakafa hapaonekwe ma bhonzo achibuda ku Warren hills, THAT IS IMPOSSIBLE
Asi panova ne kuyeuka muna ANI na ANI anenge adiwa,
Munhu kana uchi muka kuvakafa uno tanga kuyeuka kuti aaah ko zvandaiva ini HEBERT CHITEPO wacho
Obva watoti, ahhh saka handina kufa
Ndokuvamba kwe zororo mu hana dze vano namata
Nekuti chinhu chiri kuti shaisa zororo mu pfungwa kufirwa nekutya kufa bedzi
Hurwere haisi nyaya, hunotozoita nyaya wafunga kuti saka ndakufa ndosiya mhuri yangu
Asi kana uka tarisana ne rufu iwe wakamuka hauvhunduke, nekuti unoti kudzoka kwandaita izvezvi ndava George ini ndainbova HEBERT, ndichango dzoka futi
Pane nyaya nde apa
Pakutanga taka yera taiti ukafa , waidzoka se mwana we mwana wako , kana mwana we mwana we mwana wako, zvichi enderana ne nguva yawafa

Mwari achitipa basa reku rova guva, raisava rekudzosa mudzimu kana mweya we munhu mumusha, raitova basa reku kumbira kuti Baba vangu zvavafa ngavazodzoka ivo, kureva kuberekwa chaiko kwete kusviko gara se zi mweya kana mudzimu
Asi vanhu vakazo rasa musoro we nyaya ndokutanga kuti vadzoka, tava gadza pana nhingi
Kana pa mombe yakati
Ndo izwi rakabva rati Tsika yamava kuita pakurova makuva haicga reva chinhu, saka ndaisa STOP , hakuna acharohwa guva
Pakurohwa kwai itwa guva, vaporofiti vaitarisa kuti munhu uyu mabasa ake atendwa here
Kana paine zvino fanira kugadziriswa zvaibva zva gadziriswa
Zvamanga makuita pa nyaradzo zviya same same
Va porofiti vachiti ndaona vacheuka
Vari kutadziswa kufamba ne nyaya ye mombe yavo yakatorwa ne muninina wavo akasa bhadhara
Kuchivanhu vai ita zvimwe chete,
Uyu aha kwanise kudzoka mumusha uyu nekuti akaponda munhu
Hapana aizo enda kuseri kwe musha woita zvinoitwa kuti munhu adzoke mumusha
Mweya wake pawaitadza kudzoka mumusha , kwaitova kushaya nhaka
Saka waitandirwa kure kure
Pamwe waito dzengerera kwe 100 years uchiripa
Mwari ndiye anoziva ipapo
Asi kwatiri mufi anenge a FAR
Kure ne musha
Mwari akanzwa Tsitsi mbichana mweya iwowo waino berekwa ku Russia ukooooo
Isu vana vake tiri ku ZIMBABWE
Ndokuti munhu a FAR
Aberekwa ku RUSSIA uko anenge asina rugare
Anenge ari mu gehena
Atraye chino , zvaramba
Ati ndiendewo ku basa , arohwa ne train
Ahana kufa asi abviswa makumbo ne maoko
Mukadzi ati handigarire pano chirema ini
Mumusoro make ari mumoto
Ahana mufaro
Ndo gehena iroro
Ahacha yeuka kuti vana vandaiva navo
Kwa ari atori munhu munyuwani
Kwozoita iwe nhasi , toti wakaipa stereki , waonekwa usina kodzero yekudzoka mu musha, mweya wako uno dzengerera kwenguva refu
Mwari akanzwa tsitsi mbichana anobva ati ngauberekwe se BERE
Ndo kufa uchi muka chikara dondo,
Kana kuti chikara che dondo
Vamwe vachamuka nyoka
Nekuti Mwari vanoti waitorarama se nyoka uri mupenyu paye
Ndo hunhu hwe nyoka hwawaka sarudza uhwooo
Vamwe dzaiva mbavha huru dzai shamisira, asi pavakafa , vakanzi waida kuba stereki ka iwe, chiberekwa sembwa udzidze kuchengetedza zvinhu zve vanhu
Ndo kumuka zvikara dondo
Kwete kuti sekuru vaizoiswa pa Mombe what what, akuudza kuti mweya wamaisa pa mombe ndewa sekuru vako ndiani
Wobva wati ahhh iwe bhuru iri ukada kuri bopa mwana ano rwara
Ko kana uri mweya wa tony blair wanga uchito shayawo pekuenda, ukabva wati ahh regai ndiende pa mombe yanda gadzwa ndongoita sa sekuru
Maona njodzi yeku gadza mweya wausinga one paumwe mweya
Ndo nhamo iri ku masowe
Mweya iya yaidzengerera ndo mizhinji yakuziva kuti ndikati ndini Ginatsio handishaye imba
Kureva mutumbi wekugara
Unoziva sei kuti uyu ndi Ginatsio uyu ahasi
Munobva mati neku tyora mitumbi mitatu
Ko kana uri mweya we munhu aienda kumasowe achi paridza dare rajakopo
Munoti ahuzive mitumbi mitatu
Mweya iwowo nyangwe usinga zive mitumbi mitatu, imi paye pamunoti munhu aka batwa ne mweya anofanira kupinda matunhu matatu kuno rairidzwa, ndo gap rawo
Unosvika wo downloader information kwese
Imi muchiti muporofiti ari kudzidziswa kufamba kwakaita izwi
Nema tauriro ai ita va Jakopo
Apedza ku DOWNLOADER monzwa achiti ndini Jakopo after 2 years
Rwendo rwangu ndakasira apa
Imi moti zvedi uyu ndi jakopo uyu
Ataura mafambiri a akaita kubva pa Nevanji
Kuzvipedza kuzvidzima
Nekuti iye Jakopo kana akafa tichamuona a muka ari iye
Ndo kumuja kwe vakafa
Regai ndimbo nyarara
Mumbo fema handiti
Dambudziko rangu ndere kuti nhau dzandino taura itsva mupungwa menyu asi itsaru
